alert.name: Windows: "AwsReplicationVolumeUpdaterService" (AwsReplicationVolumeUpdaterService) is not running (startup type automatic)

classification.summary: Known pattern matched (S003): Windows: "AwsReplicationVolumeUpdaterService" (AwsReplicationVolumeUpdaterService) is not running (startup type automatic)

resolution_steps: Attempt local service restart via SSM Run Command: net start AwsReplicationVolumeUpdaterService
Wait 60 seconds and verify service status
If local restart fails: attempt SSM Run Command full service reset
If SSM restart fails: restart EC2 instance (tag-gated: auto-restart=true)
Verify service running after EC2 restart
If still failing: escalate to human

workflow.detail: Zabbix alert: Windows: "AwsReplicationVolumeUpdaterService" (AwsReplicationVolumeUpdaterService) is not running (startup type automatic)
